build.beforeDevCommand: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\build-sidecar.ps1 && bun run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\build-sidecar.ps1 && bun run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https:; connect-src 'self' https://skripthub.net http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.longDescription: Standalone desktop IDE for editing Minecraft Skript scripts.
